name: billing-stripe
title: Parcae · Stripe Billing
description: Full Stripe billing backend for a Parcae app: 11 Models, 5 controllers, 5 hooks, 7 webhook event handlers, reconcile job, and lib helpers (stripe client, raw-body middleware, sync context). Bi-directional sync between local Models and Stripe.
author: Parcae <https://github.com/EdenCoder/parcae>

files.content:
# @parcae/billing-stripe — environment variables
# Copy the relevant lines into your app's .env.

# ─── Required ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
STRIPE_SECRET_KEY=sk_test_...
STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET=whsec_...

# ─── Optional: redirect URLs ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Used by /v1/billing/checkout and /v1/billing/portal when the client doesn't
# pass explicit URLs. Fallback chain: request body → env → FRONTEND_URL.
FRONTEND_URL=http://localhost:3000
STRIPE_SUCCESS_URL=http://localhost:3000/settings/billing?success=1
STRIPE_CANCEL_URL=http://localhost:3000/settings/billing?cancel=1
STRIPE_PORTAL_RETURN_URL=http://localhost:3000/settings/billing

# ─── Optional: dev ergonomics ────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Skip signature verification (dev only — NEVER enable in production).
# STRIPE_SKIP_SIGNATURE_VERIFY=1

# Disallow body reconstruction if the stream was already consumed. When
# disabled (default behaviour: enabled), the webhook route reconstructs
# via JSON.stringify(req.body) — works in practice, but isn't byte-exact.
# Set to "false" to require strict raw body (recommended for production if
# you can guarantee raw-body capture).
# STRIPE_WEBHOOK_ALLOW_RECONSTRUCTED=false
